🐦 "గువ్వల జరం అమ్మ..." – a timeless Telugu rhyme, recited with love by our little Veeksha. 💛 Every rhyme is a step towards preserving our beautiful language and culture. Watching little ones learn and enjoy Telugu is a joy beyond words. If this made you smile, don't forget to ❤️ Like, 💬 Comment your favorite childhood rhyme, 📤 Share, and 🔔 Follow @veekshadiaries for more adorable learning moments. #trendingnow #telugupoems #veeksha #guvvakijaramamma #oldisgold✨
